name: Citrus Marinated Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 2 large Garlic cloves, very finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place mushrooms, oil, zests and juices in a non-reactive saucepan over high heat.
2. Bring to a boil and remove from heat.
3. Transfer mixture to a glass jar or bowl.
4. Stir in garlic, salt, mustard seed, cilantro, cayenne, and pepper.
5. Allow to cool completely.
6. Cover and refrigerate for at least 24 hours before serving.
7. Drain mushrooms and serve. Serves 4.
Origin: Cookbook Digest, May/June 1993
Shared by: Sharon Stevens
